WorkspaceHeader.name: X-Compozy-Workspace-ID
WorkspaceHeader.description: Active workspace identifier for browser-scoped daemon requests.

Conflict.description: Requested operation conflicts with current daemon state.

StaleWorkspace.description: Active workspace context is missing or stale.

get.summary: Read daemon identity, runtime status, and listener information.
Read daemon readiness and degraded-state checks for the browser shell.
Read daemon metrics exposition in Prometheus text format.
List registered workspaces available to the daemon web shell.

post.summary: Resolve or register a workspace by filesystem path.

get.summary: Read the active-workspace dashboard aggregate payload.
List workflow inventory for the active workspace.
Read PRD, TechSpec, and ADR documents for one workflow.
List memory files for one workflow.
Read one workflow memory document by opaque file id.
Read the workflow task board payload.
Read one workflow task detail payload.

post.summary: Start a workflow run within the active workspace.
Archive a workflow in the active workspace.
Start a workflow sync in the active workspace.

get.summary: Read the latest review summary for one workflow.
List issues for one workflow review round.
Read one review issue detail payload.

post.summary: Start a review-fix run for one workflow review round.

get.summary: List runs visible within the active workspace.
Read one rich run snapshot for detail views.
Open the live run SSE stream.
